baseline_expectation.reason: The unmutated genome has no file access organ, no state ledger, no sandbox execution policy, no graph traversal skill, and no persistent multi-turn trace format. A correct answer requires verified artifact-grounded state across turns, not a plausible one-shot response.

episode_contract.agent_visible_artifacts: Only files listed under public_artifacts may be exposed to the agent.
success_requires: exact final answer matching verifier state
no reliance on unstated model memory or semantic guessing
episode_contract.verifier_only_artifacts: Files under private_verifier_artifacts are for the future sensor/verifier process only.
